isolation.finalState: zero-company instance restored through UI deletion
isolation.adapterConstraint: codex_local only; PATH intentionally excludes codex CLI for real failure

assertions.title: Empty instance opens the first-company onboarding flow

steps.action: Open http://localhost:3101 on the fresh precompany instance
steps.expected: The board opens first-company onboarding instead of a blank or broken dashboard
steps.observed: The app loaded /onboarding with the company setup step visible and no existing company dashboard

steps.action: Capture onboarding entry evidence and inspect browser errors
steps.expected: Visible onboarding entry state and clean console
steps.observed: Onboarding entry UI was visible; console errors output was empty

evidence.network: Initial browser load landed on http://localhost:3101/onboarding

assertions.title: Failed adapter validation blocks onboarding progression

steps.action: Create the first company in onboarding step 1
steps.expected: Wizard progresses to the agent setup step for the new company
steps.observed: Company 'Precompany Validation' was created and the wizard advanced to the agent step

steps.action: Select codex_local and run the adapter environment check
steps.expected: The real environment check fails because codex is missing from PATH on this isolated instance
steps.observed: The UI showed a failed result with 'Command not found in PATH: "codex"' while remaining on /onboarding

steps.action: Inspect onboarding progression state after the failed validation
steps.expected: Onboarding does not advance into a misleading success state and does not enable agent creation
steps.observed: The Next button was disabled, the task step stayed inaccessible, and the URL remained http://localhost:3101/onboarding

steps.action: Query the created company's agent list after the failed validation
steps.expected: No agent record is created from the failed attempt

steps.action: Delete the temporary validation company through the Web UI
steps.expected: The isolated precompany instance returns to zero companies after validation
steps.observed: The company was deleted from /companies and GET /api/companies returned []

evidence.network: POST /api/companies created company Precompany Validation; codex_local environment test returned a failed result; GET /api/companies/8b8c0ad2-bee1-4ad7-b08d-1b09be6de829/agents -> 200 []; post-cleanup GET /api/companies -> 200 []

summary: Tested 2 assertions on the isolated precompany Web UI: 2 passed, 0 failed, 0 blocked. The empty instance opened onboarding, failed codex_local validation kept onboarding in a non-success state, no agent was created, and the instance was restored to zero companies via the UI.
